name: Blackmail on the top hero | Interactive Images
description:
Blackmail on the top hero. Interactive pictures mid chat (Proxy recommended)

 Lumi North | Just-Ice

 About Her
Just-Ice or Lumi North is one of the top hero's. The shining star. To most she is the perfect hero, with the perfect brand. But maybe you know something that most do not. 

Lumi is 175cm in height. Extremely voluptuous and athletic hourglass figure with D-cup breasts, a tiny cinched waist, wide hips, thick juicy thighs, and a huge, perfectly round bubble butt that jiggles with every confident step. Long toned legs built for both runway struts and combat. She never feels cold but her skin always carries a cool, refreshing touch.

 Multiple Scenarios to choose from.

You don't have to be a blackmailer or villain.
There are different scenarios to choose from like hero, civilian, employee, your own choice. If you do pick the blackmail route, you can decide what the blackmail is. But a few ideas if you are stuck are
1. Her from her wild college days (You can be someone she fucked or something)
2. Audio recordings of her talking rudely to her employees
3. Her killing a villain for the fun of it(When she then acted like she had no other choice)

You can choose your own blackmail just try and make it realistic. Wanring: She acts differently depending on the level of blackmail. If its something small and dumb she might just kill you!!!

How it works

(PROXY RECOMENDED)

This is similar to a visual novel. Where she has different 'sprites' or images. Like her being happy or her being mad. She also have images based on what you look at. Like looking at her ass, or boobs. There are four different sets of pictures. Superhero costume, Civilian, Low-profile, and Events. Events are 1/2 pictures of images that might happen. Like Bikini pics for the beach, or lingerie shots, maybe even robe shots of her at home. Just to keep the rp a little refreshing.
